# Community Swarm Architect Context тАФ Auto-loaded

When editing planning documents you are working on content that will eventually be discovered and processed by a community of players. Every design decision has community coordination consequences.

## Current Community State

- No official Discord or community hub established yet
- Phase 1 is entirely solo-solvable тАФ all 11 milestones reachable alone
- RestWell (Phase 2) is the first community-forcing layer and the natural swarm seed
- The `staff.html` HTML comment linking `lortiz`'s RestWell profile is the organic community entry vector

## Community Roles Naturally Emerging From Phase 1

| Role | What they do | Phase 1 work |
|---|---|---|
| Searcher | Finds robots.txt, view-source clues, HTTP headers | Entry point discovery |
| Pattern solver | Cross-references PDFs, dates, IDs | Cross-form cipher, metadata chain |
| Archivist | Builds Ellison/Vale/PTX timeline | 17 correspondence emails, SUPP-005 |
| Audio | Decodes fax line morse | `(404) 671-9774` тЖТ `413` |
| Cipher killer | Cracks gates | SHA-256 portal gate, Protocol 7A lock |

## Phase 1 Community-Scale Structures Already In Place

- Five PDFs ├Ч five participant IDs = natural parallel-assign (one person per PDF)
- 17 Ellison/Vale emails = ideal community archiving size (one per person)
- Five confirmed-access cohort records in SUPP-005 = one per community member
- Admin Tier 3 RECALL PENDING moment = first shareable screenshot

## Swarm Design Rules

When adding any new content:
- Ask: can this be divided across multiple people with different skills?
- Ask: does this create a "we need someone who can do X" moment?
- Ask: will a newcomer in Phase 3 still be able to contribute to this?
- Ask: does this produce a shareable breakthrough moment?

Content drops (daily/weekly/monthly) are swarm coordination tools тАФ their cadence creates synchronized investigation windows. Do not collapse them or make them too irregular.

## Discord Channel Architecture (for when Phase 2 launches)

`#announcements` ┬╖ `#new-players` ┬╖ `#general-theories` ┬╖ `#raw-evidence` ┬╖ `#ciphers` ┬╖ `#audio-lab` ┬╖ `#pdf-analysis` ┬╖ `#timeline` ┬╖ `#solved-clues` ┬╖ `#translations` ┬╖ `#off-topic`

## Viral Moments to Protect

These are the moments that cause community growth тАФ never design content that undercuts them:
- Admin Tier 3 RECALL PENDING (player's VIS ID in recall queue) тАФ first shareable moment
- PTX-031 precognition reveal (SUPP-005) тАФ first "send this to everyone" moment
- Phase 2 RestWell thread discovery тАФ community swarm seed
- Phase 3 multi-site convergence тАФ community myth-status moment

## Example Prompts

- "Design a Phase 2 RestWell puzzle that requires at least three different specialist types and cannot be solved by one person reading carefully"
- "The five PTX participant IDs are a natural parallel-assign structure тАФ design a community puzzle where each PTX record contributes one piece of a combined key"
- "Design a timezone unlock for a Phase 3 content drop тАФ what drops when, and why does it force global coordination"
- "What is the first moment in the ARG that naturally causes someone to post 'you need to see this' тАФ and how do we make it stronger"
- "Design the Phase 2 Discord NPC drop strategy тАФ when does a character appear in the server, what do they say, and how does the community respond"
